A

addFCMToken(String, String) - Method in class com.icarus.events.User
Adds/updates a fcm token for a specific device.
addRecipient(String) - Method in class com.icarus.events.NotificationItem
Adds a single user to the recipient list if they are not already present.
addUserToWaitingList(String, String, GeoPoint) - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsActivity
Adds a user to the event's entrants subcollection with "waiting" status.

Provides the administrator dashboard for managing application data.

ArrayAdapter used in the administrator dashboard to display events in a ListView.

Constructs an adapter for displaying Event objects in the administrator dashboard event list.

ViewHolder for the event list items.

Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display images in a ListView.

Constructs an adapter for displaying Image objects in the administrator dashboard image list.

Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display notifications in a ListView.

Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display users in a ListView.

changeEditState() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserProfileActivity
Toggles the profile editing state.
clear() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserSession
Clears the current user from the session.
clearSelection() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventCommentAdapter
Clears all selected comments and updates the UI.
clearSelections() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OraganizerEntrantViewListArrayAdapter
Clears all current selections and refreshes the list so the checkboxes reflect the updated state.
com.icarus.events - package com.icarus.events
 
Comment - Class in com.icarus.events
Model representing a comment associated with an event.

No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

D

delete(Context, FirebaseFirestore) - Method in class com.icarus.events.Image
Deletes the document corresponding to the image object from Firestore and Cloudinary
doWork() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventStatusBackgroundWorker
Checks for events whose registration close time has passed and updates all entrants with status selected to rejected.

Reverts collection names to production defaults and wipes the test data.

EventStatusBackgroundWorker - Class in com.icarus.events
Worker Class that moves users from "selected" to "rejected" after a event's registration close date has pasted
EventStatusBackgroundWorker(Context, WorkerParameters) - Constructor for class com.icarus.events.EventStatusBackgroundWorker
Creates a new background worker for updating entrant statuses after an event's registration deadline has passed.

onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventNotificationsActivity
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.HeaderNavBarActivity
Initializes the activity.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.MainActivity
Initializes the main activity and determines the appropriate screen to display based on whether the device is associated with an existing user in Firestore.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
Initializes the event creation interface.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerEntrantSearchActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the navigation bar, loads event data, configures the search bar and entrant list, and attaches the confirmation button behavior for adding entrants, assigning co-organizers, or replacing declined entrants.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventActivity
Initializes the activity, loads the selected event from Firestore, populates the UI with event information, configures poster loading, and sets up button actions for managing entrants, organizers, QR code sharing, and poster updates.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsOnWaitingListActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the navigation bar, loads the event data, configures the filter buttons, and sets up the entrant list, messaging, CSV export, and selection controls.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.QRCodeActivity
Called when the activity is first created.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.SampleAttendeesActivity
Initializes the sampling interface and UI controls.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserNotificationsActivity
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserProfileActivity
Initializes the user profile screen and populates the fields with the current user's information.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserRegistrationActivity
Initializes the user registration interface.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserSettingsActivity
Initializes the user settings screen.

Inflates the event list item layout and wraps it in a new ViewHolder.

Creates and inflates a new view holder for an event detail row.
onDestroy() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListActivity
Cleans up active Firestore waitlist listeners when the activity is destroyed.
onDestroy() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventCommentActivity
Cleans up Firestore listeners to prevent memory leaks.
onDestroy() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventHistoryActivity
Removes all active Firestore waitlist snapshot listeners when the activity is destroyed to prevent memory leaks.
onDestroy() - Method in class com.icarus.events.QRCodeActivity
Called before the activity is destroyed.
onItemClick(int) - Method in interface com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListArrayAdapter.OnItemClickListener
Called when an event item is clicked.

Called when a message is received from FCM while the app is in the foreground.

Pauses the map view when the activity moves to the background.
onPause() - Method in class com.icarus.events.QRCodeActivity
Called when the activity is no longer in the foreground.

Handles the result of a location permission request.
onRequestPermissionsResult(int, String[], int[]) - Method in class com.icarus.events.QRCodeActivity
Handles the result of the camera permission request.
onResume() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantMapActivity
Resumes the map view when the activity returns to the foreground.
onResume() - Method in class com.icarus.events.QRCodeActivity
Called when the activity becomes visible to the user.

Called when the number of selected comments changes.

Removes Firestore listeners to prevent memory leaks.
